overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game showing a survivor walking down a deserted mountain road. The character passes concrete barriers with ominous graffiti, abandoned vehicles, and winds through rocky terrain with snow-capped peaks in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the deserted mountain road toward concrete barriers with graffiti

entered.detail: large concrete barrier blocking part of the road with red graffiti
red painted text on the concrete barrier reading 'GATHER THE LOST WILL FALL'
tall rocky mountain with snow visible on the peak
wooden utility poles with wires running along the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a sunlit mountain road toward a concrete barrier. The barrier features ominous red graffiti reading 'THE LOST WILL FALL'. Tall pine trees and rocky cliffs line the road, with a dramatic snow-capped peak visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside with abandoned container and vehicle

events.description: passing the graffiti-covered concrete barrier and entering the open road section with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: passing the concrete barrier and continuing past an abandoned container toward a red car

notable_agents.action: abandoned red sedan parked on the roadside, approaching it

entered.detail: large beige shipping container or trailer with graffiti on the side

segments.scene_description: The character passes the concrete barrier and walks alongside an abandoned beige shipping container. A red sedan comes into view ahead on the right. The road continues through the rocky mountain terrain with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with speed limit sign

events.description: passing the abandoned red car on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the open mountain road past the abandoned vehicle

entered.detail: white road sign indicating speed limit of 45

segments.scene_description: Having passed the abandoned vehicles, the character continues down the winding mountain road. A speed limit sign indicating '45' appears on the right. The road stretches ahead toward the misty mountain peak, flanked by rocky outcrops and scattered pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit mountain road that gradually winds deeper into a desolate, rocky wilderness. It begins with the character approaching a concrete barrier marked by ominous red graffiti, with tall pine trees and a dramatic snow-capped peak framing the horizon. As the character passes the barrier, the scene shifts to reveal an abandoned beige shipping container and a red sedan stranded on the roadside amidst sparse vegetation. The camera then follows the character further down the winding path, passing a speed limit sign as the road stretches forward. Finally, the environment opens up toward the misty mountain peak, flanked by jagged rocky outcrops and scattered pines.
